creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #1)

1. As for textproc/xhtml-modularization, I checked files included in distribution archive but none of them includes license condition in it. So I considered that general W3C Document License is applied. On the other hand, I also checked files in archive of this port and found there is license condition in xhtml-basic10.dtd that is different from W3C Document License. So I considered this one is applied.

2. As is extracted to files/LICENSE of submitted patch, there is following sentence in the license condition included in xhtml-basic10.dtd.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Permission to use, copy, modify and distribute the XHTML Basic DTD and
its accompanying documentation for any purpose and without fee is
hereby granted in perpetuity, provided that the above copyright notice
and this paragraph appear in all copies.
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Since it includes "without fee", I considered dist-sell and pkg-sell aren't permitted.
